pi_items.source: USITC HTS Chapter 85 covers Electrical Machinery and Equipment; HTS code 8507.60 is the specific code for lithium-ion accumulators (rechargeable batteries)
Web search results confirm HTS code 8507.60.0000 is the standard classification for lithium-ion rechargeable battery packs
USITC HTS Chapter 09 covers Coffee, Tea, Maté and Spices; HTS code 0902 covers tea products
Web search results confirm HTS code 0902.10.9015 and 0902.10.9050 are for green tea (not fermented) in bulk packaging over 3kg
USITC HTS Chapter 73 covers Articles of Iron or Steel; HTS code 7318 covers screws, bolts, nuts and similar articles
Web search results confirm HTS code 7318.15.2061 is for stainless steel bolts with hexagonal heads, and 7318.15.2091 for other bolt configurations
USITC HTS Chapter 69 covers Ceramic Products; HTS codes 6911 (porcelain/china) and 6912 (other ceramic) apply to ceramic mugs and tableware
Web search results confirm HTS code 6911.10.37-38 for porcelain mugs and 6912.00.4400 for stoneware/ceramic mugs
USITC HTS Chapter 61 covers Articles of Apparel and Clothing Accessories, Knitted or Crocheted; HTS code 6109 covers t-shirts
Web search results confirm HTS code 6109.10.0012 is for men's cotton knit t-shirts; general duty rate is 16.5% ad valorem
Standard Linux home directory convention for user 'ga'; path is correctly specified in task.json and verified in export_result.sh script
Folder name specified in task.json, also referenced in verifier.py and export_result.sh for Firefox bookmark tracking
Web search results indicate HTS code 8507.60.0000 has a general duty rate of 3.4% ad valorem
Organic green tea under HTS 0902.10.9015 has free duty status (duty-free) under current U.S. tariff schedule
Web search results show HTS code 7318.15 bolts have varying duty rates: 7318.15.20 is Free, while 7318.15.80 is 8.5%; rates depend on specific subheading
Web search results show HTS code 6911.10.37 has 8% general duty rate and 6912.00.48 has 9.8% general duty rate
Web search results show HTS code 6109 has general duty rate of 7%, but specific subheadings like 6109.10.0012 (men's cotton t-shirts) are 16.5% ad valorem

privileged_info_summary: The HTS tariff classification data in this task is based on the official USITC Harmonized Tariff Schedule (a real government database). All metadata claims about HTS chapters and code prefixes have been verified: Lithium-ion batteries are classified under Chapter 85 (8507.60, 3.4% duty); organic green tea under Chapter 09 (0902.10, duty-free); stainless steel bolts under Chapter 73 (7318.15, free to 8.5% duty); ceramic mugs under Chapter 69 (6911/6912, 8-9.8% duty); and cotton t-shirts under Chapter 61 (6109.10, 7-16.5% duty). The output file path (/home/ga/Documents/tariff_classification.json) and bookmark folder name (Trade Compliance) are correctly specified. This is not synthetic data—it represents real tariff classifications used by U.S. Customs and Border Protection.
